title: Task Sidecar
description: Structured metadata for a task definition, stored alongside the .md file

task_id.description: Fully qualified task ID with phase prefix (e.g. 'phase_1/red_01_task_name'). MUST start with 'phase_N/'.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task

feature_gates.description: Feature gate file paths this task creates or tests against

requirement_mappings.description: Requirement IDs directly tested by assertions in this task

contributes_to.description: Requirement IDs partially advanced but not directly tested by this task
